creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Oleg, 

thanks for the update. Somehow slipped my attention in the run-up before the holidays.

The "pet portlint" part is harmful because we need separate maintainer and description for the chrony-lite port that is maintained by decke@, hence the ?= are alright. Can you redo the patch without changing the "?=" to "="? Feel free to add a comment or a slave port marker. Spasibo!
